name: Organic Fuji Apples
description: Crisp and sweet organic Fuji apples, perfect for snacking or baking. Sourced from local orchards.

name: Premium Bananas
description: Perfectly ripened premium bananas. Rich in potassium and naturally sweet.

name: Farm Fresh Whole Milk
description: Creamy whole milk from grass-fed cows. No added hormones or antibiotics.

name: Artisan Sourdough Bread
description: Hand-crafted sourdough bread with a perfectly crispy crust and soft interior. Naturally fermented for 24 hours.

name: Fresh Broccoli Crown
description: Vibrant green broccoli crowns, packed with vitamins and minerals. Perfect for steaming or roasting.

name: Free-Range Eggs
description: Farm fresh free-range eggs from pasture-raised hens. Rich golden yolks with superior taste.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, triple-washed and ready to eat. Perfect for salads and smoothies.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy Greek yogurt made with whole milk. High in protein, no artificial flavors.

name: Avocados
description: Perfectly ripe Hass avocados. Creamy texture, ideal for guacamole, toast, or salads.

name: Atlantic Salmon Fillet
description: Wild-caught Atlantic salmon fillet. Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids. Sustainably sourced.

name: Cherry Tomatoes
description: Sweet and juicy cherry tomatoes, vine-ripened for maximum flavor. Great for salads and snacking.

name: Organic Chicken Breast
description: Organic boneless, skinless chicken breast. No antibiotics, humanely raised.
